title: safeguarding — permissions
description: Safeguarding is CHILD PROTECTION-CRITICAL. Reporting is broadly permitted (anyone can flag); everything downstream is tightly gated to officer + owner. Case-access grants provide per-incident visibility to specific investigators.

permissions.name: safeguarding.incidents.viewAny
permissions.description: See incident list. Officer + owner only.

permissions.name: safeguarding.incidents.view
permissions.description: See individual incident detail. Case-access grants apply.

permissions.name: safeguarding.incidents.report
permissions.description: Report a new incident. Broad access to encourage disclosure.

permissions.name: safeguarding.incidents.escalate
permissions.description: Escalate to external authorities. Applies legal hold.

permissions.name: safeguarding.incidents.grant-access
permissions.description: Grant per-incident case access to another user. Full audit chain.

permissions.name: platform.safeguarding.audit
permissions.description: Cross-tenant safeguarding audit. Anonymised metadata for regulatory reporting (Ofsted / DBS statistics).
